{"request-inputs":{"status":"success","output":{"product_text":"Sleek wireless noise-canceling headphones with 40-hour battery life and spatial audio.","product_photo":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1505740420928-5e560c06d30e?w=800"}},"crop-tight":{"status":"success","output":{"cropped_image":"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},"startedAt":1784664887640,"duration":7881},"crop-wide":{"status":"success","output":{"cropped_image":"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},"startedAt":1784664887640,"duration":6605},"gemini-desc":{"status":"success","output":{"output":"## Silence the World. Amplify Your Journey.\n\n### Introducing the AuraFlow Pro: Your Sanctuary of Sound, Untethered.\n\nStep into a realm where the outside world gracefully recedes, and your audio comes alive with unparalleled clarity and endurance. The AuraFlow Pro aren't just headphones; they are an meticulously engineered extension of your personal space, designed for the discerning individual who demands nothing less than perfection in sound, style, and uninterrupted performance.\n\n**Experience Unrivaled Tranquility with Advanced Active Noise Cancellation (ANC):**\nImagine a world where your daily commute transforms into a serene escape, a bustling office melts into a productive haven, or a cross-continental flight becomes your private concert hall. The AuraFlow Pro's state-of-the-art Active Noise Cancellation technology creates an intelligent acoustic barrier, precisely identifying and neutralizing distractions from the low hum of an airplane engine to the chatter of a busy cafe. It doesn't just block noise; it crafts a whisper-quiet sanctuary, allowing you to dive deeper into your music, podcasts, audiobooks, or simply enjoy moments of pure, undisturbed silence. Rediscover focus, enhance relaxation, and truly connect with your content, uninterrupted by the chaos of your surroundings.\n\n**Unleash Limitless Sound with a Marathon 40-Hour Battery Life:**\nThe freedom of wireless should never come with the anxiety of a dying battery. With an astonishing **40 hours of continuous playback** on a single charge, the AuraFlow Pro liberates you from the tether of charging cables and the constant search for an outlet. Embark on a multi-day adventure, power through an entire work week, or indulge in back-to-back cinematic experiences without a second thought. This isn't just extended battery life; it's peace of mind. It's the assurance that your soundtrack to life, your productivity tool, or your personal escape will be ready when you are, from the first listen of the day to the last, long after competitors have powered down. Experience true untethered living, wherever your journey takes you.\n\n**Beyond Silence and Endurance: A Masterpiece of Audio & Design:**\nWhile the AuraFlow Pro redefine active noise cancellation and battery endurance, their premium experience extends throughout every detail:\n\n*   **Immersive Spatial Audio:** Go beyond stereo. Experience a dynamic, three-dimensional soundscape where audio moves around you, creating an astonishingly lifelike and cinematic listening experience that pulls you directly into the heart of your content.\n*   **Sleek, Ergonomic Design:** Crafted with a minimalist aesthetic and premium, lightweight materials, the AuraFlow Pro are designed to be as comfortable as they are striking. Soft, breathable earcups and an adjustable headband ensure a perfect fit for extended wear, making them an elegant companion for any occasion.\n*   **Crystal-Clear Calls:** Integrated microphones with advanced voice isolation ensure your calls are as pristine as your music, cutting through noise so your voice is always heard loud and clear.\n\n**The AuraFlow Pro:** It's more than just sound; it's an elevated way of living. Redefine your auditory world with unparalleled silence, boundless energy, and breathtaking immersion.\n\n**Discover the AuraFlow Pro today and transform how you experience sound.**"},"startedAt":1784664887640,"duration":17149},"gemini-tweet":{"status":"running","output":null,"startedAt":1784664904835},"gemini-post":{"status":"pending","output":null},"response-node":{"status":"pending","output":null}}
